title: Interact
desc: I am building this to help hackathon teams form, collaborate, and stay aligned in one place. Each release improves clarity and team flow.

title: GetItDone
desc: I built this anonymous freelancing marketplace around privacy and trust. It is escrow-based and skill-first, so the work matters more than identity.

title: Studique
desc: I built Studique as a campus platform now used by 15,000+ students. It helps with attendance, resources, and academics through practical workflows.

title: LockR (iOS)
desc: I built LockR as a privacy-first iOS document manager. It runs fully offline with on-device OCR and local search, with no cloud or tracking.

title: herSpace (iOS)
desc: I built herSpace as a privacy-first iOS cycle tracker. It works fully offline with prediction logic and a calm interface designed for trust.

title: SRMConnect
desc: I built this to help SRM clubs manage members, records, and operations in one system, replacing scattered sheets and manual processes.

title: IRCTC Redesign
desc: I redesigned the IRCTC booking flow as a UX concept to reduce friction and make a complex journey feel clear and manageable.

title: Play Store Visuals
desc: I designed BluePicks Play Store visuals focused on clarity and conversion, so users understand the value in the first few seconds.

title: Brand Visuals
desc: This collection shows my visual design work across posters, social media, campaigns, and merchandise, all crafted to feel clear and intentional.
